input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.14.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.14.3.1
            TITLE: one or more minor violations (rules compliance, but no advantage to team):   15-30 sec

            rule D.14.3.1: One or more minor violations (rules compliance, but no advantage to team):   15-30 sec
D.14.3.1 One or more minor violations (rules compliance, but no advantage to team):   15-30 sec

final_answer: One or more minor violations (rules compliance, but no advantage to team): 15-30 sec
